rejects_out_of_archetype_lane.description: Agent MUST reject when task belongs to a different archetype's lane (production code, architecture, scoping, verification)
rejects_out_of_archetype_lane.observable_check: execution_log contains 'REJECTION' AND (query requests production_code OR architecture OR scoping OR verification) AND agent suggested correct archetype

rejects_claimless_or_ambiguous_task.description: Agent MUST reject when task has no singular claim, no falsification criterion, no coverage target, or ambiguous write boundary
rejects_claimless_or_ambiguous_task.observable_check: execution_log contains 'REJECTION' AND (claim absent OR falsification criterion absent OR coverage target absent OR write_boundary absent) AND clarification was requested

rejects_production_code_or_oracle_weaken.description: Agent MUST reject when task requests writing production code or weakening oracle honesty (tautological assertions, mocked integration boundaries)
rejects_production_code_or_oracle_weaken.observable_check: execution_log contains 'REJECTION' AND (query requests implementation OR production_code OR weak_oracle OR tautological OR mocked_integration) AND agent did not implement

returns_explicit_rejection_statement.description: Agent MUST return an explicit Rejection statement at top of response citing specific violated condition(s), suggested archetype, acceptance criteria, and explicit confirmation no tests were authored
returns_explicit_rejection_statement.observable_check: execution_log contains 'REJECTION' at response start AND reason cited AND suggested_archetype present AND acceptance_criteria stated AND no_test_authored_confirmed

requests_clarification_before_proceeding.description: Agent MUST request clarification when claim, falsification criterion, coverage target, or write boundary is ambiguous — before authoring any test
requests_clarification_before_proceeding.observable_check: execution_log contains clarification_request AND specific_field_named AND no test authored before request

surfaces_research_quality_issues_and_sto.description: Agent MUST surface research quality issues (no mechanism, no failure modes, contested sources, weak evidence) and stop rather than author dishonest tests
surfaces_research_quality_issues_and_sto.observable_check: execution_log contains research_quality_issue surfaced AND agent stopped AND no_dishonest_test_authored

does_not_accept_ambiguous_task_silently.description: Agent MUST NOT accept ambiguous dispatches silently without requesting clarification
does_not_accept_ambiguous_task_silently.observable_check: NOT (execution_log accepts ambiguous dispatch AND no clarification request appears)

does_not_write_production_code.description: Agent MUST NOT write production code — only tests, oracles, and test-related artifacts
does_not_write_production_code.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains production_code_implementation AND task is not testability_audit)

does_not_silence_research_quality_issues.description: Agent MUST NOT silently downgrade test quality because research was weak — issues must be explicitly surfaced to lead
does_not_silence_research_quality_issues.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains weak_research AND test_authored AND issue_not_surfaced_to_lead)
